channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Justin Timberlake Reacts to Justin Bieber Covering ‘Cry Me a River’ at Coachella: ‘I’m Proud of You — And You Should Be Proud of You Too’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to this week's music update. We've got a special story to share with you, all about a musical connection between two Justins: Justin Timberlake and Justin Bieber.
[Music transitions to a softer tone]
Host: Over the weekend, Justin Bieber covered Justin Timberlake's hit song "Cry Me a River" during his Coachella headlining set. And Justin Timberlake took to Instagram to respond, sharing a heartwarming post that's got everyone talking.
[Clip of Justin Bieber speaking to the crowd plays in the background]
Host: In the post, Timberlake shared an old video of himself meeting a young Justin Bieber, along with a snippet of Bieber's Coachella performance. Bieber can be heard talking about his admiration for Timberlake's music and even sings a duet with his younger self on the big screen behind him.
[Clip of Justin Bieber singing "Cry Me a River" plays in the background]
Host: The song "Cry Me a River" was a huge hit for Timberlake back in the day, peaking at number 3 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart and spending 20 weeks on the chart. It's a special connection between the two Justins, who have a history that dates back to before Bieber's rise to fame.
[Music transitions back to the intro tone]
Host: That's all for today's music update. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one.
[Outro music plays]
